name: Set Rigid Body Frame
description: Place an unattached RigidBody at a frame in the world (WCF). Use for static scene objects. If the body was previously attached to a link/tool, the attachment is cleared.

inputParameters.name: rigid_body_id
inputParameters.description: Id of the rigid body inside the RobotCell.

inputParameters.name: plane
inputParameters.description: Rhino Plane or COMPAS Frame describing the body's pose in the world (WCF).

outputParameters.name: cell_state
outputParameters.description: New RobotCellState with the body placed at the given frame.
